## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling / dependencies
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] I branched from `develop`
- [ ] CI passes (tests + lint + build)
- [ ] No direct secrets or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Migrations created if schema changed (`npm run migration:generate`)
